def show_dialog(page, title, content):
    dialog = ft.AlertDialog(
        title=ft.Text(title, color='#00d084'),
        content=ft.Container(content=content, padding=20),
        actions=[
            ft.TextButton('Cancelar', on_click=lambda _: page.close_dialog()),
            ft.ElevatedButton('Aceptar', bgcolor='#00d084', color='#0b1220'),
        ]
    )
    page.dialog = dialog
    dialog.open = True
    page.update()

snippets.name: pandas-groupby-agg
snippets.description: Data aggregation with groupby and agg
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

def aggregate_data(df, group_cols, agg_map):
    """Agrega datos usando groupby + agg.
    
    Args:
        df: DataFrame
        group_cols: Lista de columnas para agrupar
        agg_map: Dict {col: agg_func}, ej: {'venta': 'sum', 'cantidad': 'mean'}
    """
    result = df.groupby(group_cols, as_index=False).agg(agg_map)
    return result

snippets.name: pandas-nc-normalize
snippets.description: Normalize Notas de Credito from ERP data
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def normalize_nc(df, monto_col='monto', tipo_col='tipo_doc'):
    """Normaliza Notas de Credito: montos positivos y flag NC."""
    df = df.copy()
    df['es_nc'] = df[tipo_col].str.contains('NC|NOTA CREDITO|DEVOLUCION', case=False, na=False).astype(int)
    df[monto_col] = df.apply(
        lambda r: -abs(r[monto_col]) if r['es_nc'] else abs(r[monto_col]),
        axis=1
    )
    return df

snippets.name: pandas-calculate-kpi
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def calculate_kpis(df, venta_col='venta_bruta', costo_col='costo', devolucion_col='devolucion'):
    """Calcula KPIs derivados: margen, ratio devolucion, etc."""
    result = df.copy()
    result['margen_bruto'] = result[venta_col] - result[costo_col]
    result['margen_pct'] = np.where(
        result[venta_col] != 0,
        (result['margen_bruto'] / result[venta_col]) * 100,
        0
    )
    if devolucion_col in result.columns:
        result['ratio_devolucion'] = np.where(
            result[venta_col] != 0,
            (abs(result[devolucion_col]) / result[venta_col]) * 100,
            0
        )
    return result

snippets.name: pandas-date-range
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

def filter_by_date_range(df, date_col, start_date, end_date):
    """Filtra DataFrame por rango de fechas."""
    mask = (df[date_col] >= pd.Timestamp(start_date)) & (df[date_col] <= pd.Timestamp(end_date))
    return df[mask].copy()

# Uso:

snippets.name: pandas-gap-analysis
snippets.description: Gap analysis between catalog and purchases
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

def gap_analysis(catalogo, compras, key_col='sku'):
    """Analiza gaps entre catalogo y compras.
    
    Returns:
        Dict con: en_catalogo, en_compras, en_ambos, sin_compras, no_catalogados
    """
    cat_set = set(catalogo[key_col].unique())
    comp_set = set(compras[key_col].unique())
    return {
        'en_catalogo': len(cat_set),
        'en_compras': len(comp_set),
        'en_ambos': len(cat_set & comp_set),
        'sin_compras': len(cat_set - comp_set),
        'no_catalogados': len(comp_set - cat_set),
    }

snippets.name: pandas-temporal-compare
snippets.description: Temporal comparison A vs B period
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

def temporal_compare(df, date_col, value_col, group_col, period_a, period_b):
    """Compara metricas entre dos periodos.
    
    Args:
        period_a, period_b: Tuplas (start, end) como strings 'YYYY-MM-DD'
    """
    a = df[(df[date_col] >= period_a[0]) & (df[date_col] <= period_a[1])]
    b = df[(df[date_col] >= period_b[0]) & (df[date_col] <= period_b[1])]
    
    a_agg = a.groupby(group_col)[value_col].sum().rename('periodo_a')
    b_agg = b.groupby(group_col)[value_col].sum().rename('periodo_b')
    
    result = pd.concat([a_agg, b_agg], axis=1).fillna(0)
    result['variacion'] = result['periodo_b'] - result['periodo_a']
    result['variacion_pct'] = (result['variacion'] / result['periodo_a'].replace(0, float('nan'))) * 100
    return result

snippets.name: pandas-hhi-index
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def calculate_hhi(df, group_col, value_col):
    """Calcula el indice HHI de concentracion.
    
    HHI = sum((share_i)^2) donde share_i es proporcion del total.
    > 2500: Alta concentracion
    1500-2500: Concentracion moderada
    < 1500: Baja concentracion
    """
    total = df[value_col].sum()
    if total == 0:
        return 0.0
    shares = df.groupby(group_col)[value_col].sum() / total
    hhi = (shares ** 2).sum() * 10000
    return round(hhi, 2)

snippets.name: openpyxl-workbook
snippets.description: Create Excel workbook with G360 styling
snippets.code:
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side

G360_ACCENT = '00D084'
G360_SURFACE = '1A2332'
G360_TEXT = 'F0F4F8'

def create_g360_workbook():
    wb = Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    ws.title = 'Reporte G360'
    
    # Header styling
    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color=G360_ACCENT, end_color=G360_ACCENT, fill_type='solid')
    header_font = Font(bold=True, color=G360_TEXT, size=11)
    thin_border = Border(
        left=Side(style='thin', color=G360_SURFACE),
        right=Side(style='thin', color=G360_SURFACE),
        top=Side(style='thin', color=G360_SURFACE),
        bottom=Side(style='thin', color=G360_SURFACE),
    )
    
    return wb, ws, header_fill, header_font, thin_border

snippets.name: openpyxl-styled-table
snippets.description: Write styled table to Excel sheet
snippets.code:
def write_styled_table(ws, headers, data, header_fill, header_font, thin_border):
    """Escribe una tabla con headers estilizados G360."""
    # Headers
    for col_idx, header in enumerate(headers, 1):
        cell = ws.cell(row=1, column=col_idx, value=header)
        cell.fill = header_fill
        cell.font = header_font
        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center')
        cell.border = thin_border
    
    # Data
    for row_idx, row_data in enumerate(data, 2):
        for col_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
            cell = ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx, value=value)
            cell.border = thin_border
            cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center')
    
    # Auto-width
    for col in ws.columns:
        max_length = max(len(str(cell.value or '')) for cell in col)
        ws.column_dimensions[col[0].column_letter].width = max_length + 3

snippets.name: openpyxl-kpi-sheet
snippets.description: Create KPI summary sheet with formatting
snippets.code:
def write_kpi_sheet(wb, sheet_name, kpis):
    """Crea un sheet de KPIs con formato G360.
    
    kpis: [(nombre, valor, formato), ...]
    """
    ws = wb.create_sheet(title=sheet_name)
    
    accent_fill = PatternFill(start_color='00D084', end_color='00D084', fill_type='solid')
    accent_font = Font(bold=True, color='F0F4F8', size=14)
    value_font = Font(bold=True, size=20, color='00D084')
    
    ws.cell(row=1, column=1, value='KPI').fill = accent_fill
    ws.cell(row=1, column=1).font = accent_font
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2, value='Valor').fill = accent_fill
    ws.cell(row=1, column=2).font = accent_font
    
    for i, (name, value, fmt) in enumerate(kpis, 2):
        ws.cell(row=i, column=1, value=name)
        ws.cell(row=i, column=2, value=value)
        ws.cell(row=i, column=2).font = value_font
        if fmt:
            ws.cell(row=i, column=2).number_format = fmt
    
    ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 30
    ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 20

snippets.name: openpyxl-multi-sheet
snippets.code:
def create_multi_sheet_report(output_path, sheets_data):
    """Crea un Excel con multiples sheets.
    
    sheets_data: [(name, headers, rows), ...]
    """
    from openpyxl import Workbook
    wb = Workbook()
    wb.remove(wb.active)
    
    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color='00D084', end_color='00D084', fill_type='solid')
    header_font = Font(bold=True, color='F0F4F8', size=11)
    
    for name, headers, rows in sheets_data:
        ws = wb.create_sheet(title=name[:31])
        for col_idx, h in enumerate(headers, 1):
            cell = ws.cell(row=1, column=col_idx, value=h)
            cell.fill = header_fill
            cell.font = header_font
        for row_idx, row in enumerate(rows, 2):
            for col_idx, val in enumerate(row, 1):
                ws.cell(row=row_idx, column=col_idx, value=val)
    
    wb.save(output_path)
    return output_path

    self.loading.visible = False
    self.page.update()

snippets.name: flet-logo-base64
snippets.description: Embed logo as base64 (PyInstaller-safe, no file paths)
snippets.code:
import base64
from pathlib import Path

LOGO_B64 = None

def get_logo_src():
    global LOGO_B64
    if LOGO_B64:
        return LOGO_B64
    candidates = [
        Path('assets/images/logo-g360-dark.svg'),
        Path(__file__).parent / 'assets' / 'images' / 'logo-g360-dark.svg',
    ]
    for p in candidates:
        if p.exists():
            raw = p.read_bytes()
            b64 = base64.b64encode(raw).decode()
            LOGO_B64 = f'data:image/svg+xml;base64,{b64}'
            return LOGO_B64
    return None

# Uso en Flet:
# ft.Image(src_base64=get_logo_src(), height=40, fit=ft.ImageFit.CONTAIN)

snippets.name: flet-logging-setup
snippets.description: Logging setup for desktop apps (debug remoto)
snippets.code:
import logging
import sys
from pathlib import Path

def setup_logging(app_name='g360-app'):
    log_dir = Path.home() / '.g360' / 'logs'
    log_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    log_file = log_dir / f'{app_name}.log'
    
    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.DEBUG,
        format='%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s',
        handlers=[
            logging.FileHandler(log_file, encoding='utf-8'),
            logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout),
        ]
    )
    return logging.getLogger(app_name)

# Uso:
# logger = setup_logging('mi-app')
# logger.info('App iniciada')

snippets.name: flet-snackbar-error
snippets.code:
def show_error(page, message):
    page.snack_bar = ft.SnackBar(
        content=ft.Row([
            ft.Icon(ft.icons.ERROR_OUTLINE, color='#f0f4f8', size=20),
            ft.Text(str(message)[:120], color='#f0f4f8', size=14),
        ]),
        bgcolor='#ef4444',
        duration=5000,
    )
    page.snack_bar.open = True
    page.update()

def show_success(page, message):
    page.snack_bar = ft.SnackBar(
        content=ft.Row([
            ft.Icon(ft.icons.CHECK_CIRCLE, color='#0b1220', size=20),
            ft.Text(message, color='#0b1220', size=14),
        ]),
        bgcolor='#22c55e',
        duration=3000,
    )
    page.snack_bar.open = True
    page.update()

def show_warning(page, message):
    page.snack_bar = ft.SnackBar(
        content=ft.Row([
            ft.Icon(ft.icons.WARNING, color='#0b1220', size=20),
            ft.Text(message, color='#0b1220', size=14),
        ]),
        bgcolor='#f59e0b',
        duration=4000,
    )
    page.snack_bar.open = True
    page.update()
